name: Improv via Serial
description: The `improv_serial` component in ESPHome implements the open [Improv standard](https://www.improv-wifi.com/) for configuring Wi-Fi on an ESPHome device by using a serial connection to the device, eg. USB.

config_entries.label: Next URL
config_entries.description: A URL that can be used to forward the user to after setting credentials with improv.
